summary: Implementation aligns with spec: compact dashboard template, stage-aware summary, slash-command suggestions, and grouped artifacts; unit tests cover acceptance scenarios and CI passed.

requirement_checks.requirement: Factory PR descriptions render a `Factory Dashboard` section without using a table.
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs:1 (unit tests assert presence of '## Factory Dashboard' and artifact lines)

requirement_checks.requirement: Top dashboard summary is rendered as compact grouped lines instead of a key/value list.
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: renderPrBody renders plan_ready dashboard layout and assertions for summary, CI, cost, open lines

requirement_checks.requirement: Top summary line uses clearer human-facing waiting-state language (e.g. 'Human action required').
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: WAITING_DESCRIPTORS constant and formatWaitingDescriptor implementation
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: assertions for human-facing waiting descriptors in plan_ready/blocked/ready_for_review cases

requirement_checks.requirement: Suggested next actions replaced with slash-command suggestions for mutation actions.
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: assertions verifying suggested actions for plan_ready and implementing states

requirement_checks.requirement: Artifacts section renders Plan / Run / Review lines and omits empty groups.
Unit tests updated to reflect new layout and formatting helpers added to renderPrBody.
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: updated/added tests covering multiple status scenarios
CI run 23379654433: unit tests passed (reported in run metadata)

findings.title: Add explicit test asserting absence of table markup
findings.details: The acceptance criteria specify no tables should be used; current tests validate the desired lines but do not explicitly assert the absence of markdown table markers (e.g. '|').
findings.recommendation: Add a small assertion in existing rendering tests that the rendered body does not contain '|' table markers or other table constructs.

findings.title: Document template and 'Closes #' placement
findings.details: The PR-body template moved 'Closes #<issue>' to precede the serialized factory state; adding a short changelog entry or README note will help operators notice the change.
findings.recommendation: Add a short note to the repository CHANGELOG or README describing the template change and the rationale.
